subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration with our team.

We would be happy to arrange an introductory call. The following slots are available on our end:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which of these works best for you, and we will send a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for internal contact details — we are unable to share direct phone lines or personal contact information for our team members. For publicly available information about our leadership and how to reach us, please visit our website.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
